cover.era_chip: 大韓帝國 · 光武 · 國權 被奪
cover.subtitle:
황제국 13년의 짧은 빛,
다섯 조약으로 빼앗긴 나라.
cover.imagePrompt: Late-Joseon-to-Japanese-occupation illustration, year 1897. ONE Korean emperor (Gojong) seated on a low throne inside Hwangungu (환구단) interior — dark crimson robe with gold embroidery, deep crown with strings of beads, solemn frontal view. Behind him: a folding screen with sun and moon and five peaks (일월오봉도) but rendered minimally. Soft amber lamp light from upper right. On the floor near the throne: a small dragon-engraved bronze ritual vessel. Color: deep crimson + gold-amber + ink-black + dark blue-gray shadows. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_headline:
"한일의정서 → 을사 → 정미 → 병합"
네 단계를 외울 것.
outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 광무개혁의 구본신참 원칙, 을사·정미·병합 조약의 핵심 조항 구분, 헤이그 특사 3인과 안중근 하얼빈 의거(1909)의 시점 정렬이 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized small imperial seal silhouette (square stamp) overlapping a folded paper scroll suggesting an unequal treaty. RIGHT: a small broken sword silhouette suggesting disbanded army. Cream #F2EDE3 base + deep crimson #8B1E1E accent + faint gold #C9A45C line. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
